# Mini Projects

This repository contains my practice projects in:

- Medical Imaging
- OpenCV
- Deep Learning
- PyTorch
- CNNs

These projects are part of my learning journey in Computational Medical Imaging and Medical AI.

---

# Projects

## 1. Simple Medical Edge Analyzer

Description:
- Edge detection on medical X-ray images
- Image preprocessing using OpenCV
- Canny edge detection
- Contour analysis

Tools Used:
- Python
- OpenCV
- NumPy
- Matplotlib

---

## 2. CIFAR-10 CNN

Description:
- Image classification using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)
- Built with PyTorch
- Training and evaluation on CIFAR-10 dataset

Concepts Practiced:
- CNN architecture
- Convolution layers
- Pooling
- Fully connected layers
- Training loops
- Loss functions

Tools Used:
- Python
- PyTorch
- Torchvision
- Matplotlib

---

# Learning Goals

This repository is focused on improving my understanding of:
- Computer Vision
- Medical Imaging
- Deep Learning
- CNNs
- Image Preprocessing
- AI for Radiology
